name: jp.keijiro.gltfast-tweaks
description: Editor extension that adds per-asset texture import overrides (downscale, GPU compression, filter mode) to the glTFast importer.
author: Keijiro Takahashi

_upm.changelog:
Added
- Show each asset's directory path next to its file name.

Changed
- Narrowed the Size, Compression, and Filter columns.

Removed
- Removed console logging, the empty-state hint, and per-row tooltips.
